name: claude-hooks
description: Claude Code hook plugins for security, observability, and session memory

plugins.name: hook-security
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook that blocks dangerous commands (git commit --no-verify). Logs security blocks to ~/.claude/logs/security/.

plugins.name: hook-observability
plugins.description: Hooks for logging all tool usage, results, notifications, session ends, and subagent completions to ~/.claude/logs/observability/.

plugins.name: hook-session-memory
plugins.description: Hooks for preserving session context across /compact. Logs user prompts, tool usage, and structures notes at compaction time.
